terms.definition: Phase where model parameters θ are learned from labeled data by minimizing loss L(ŷ, y). Canonical definition in this topic.
Phase where a trained model with fixed θ predicts ŷ = f_θ(x) for new inputs without labels or parameter updates. Canonical definition in this topic.
scikit-learn and common ML API name for the training step: learn parameters from (X, y). Maps to the training phase in this topic.
API name for inference: apply a trained model to new feature rows X and return predictions ŷ. No labels required.
Computing ŷ = f_θ(x) through the model graph. Used in both training and inference; only training adds backward pass and θ updates.
Production deployment of inference — running frozen f_θ on live or batch requests, distinct from offline training jobs.
